heading: Step 3: (Optional) Define a .
body:
In the [mongosh](mongodb-shell) prompt, assign an object containing the
following properties of your DLQ:

- Connection name

- Database name

- Collection name

The following example defines a DLQ over the `cluster01`
connection, in the `metadata.dlq` database collection.

```sh
deadLetter = {
  dlq: {
    connectionName: "cluster01",
    db: "metadata",
    coll: "dlq"
  }
}
```
